commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content:
Baal, or Bal lath, Josue xix. 1.
Distribution. Hebrew and Septuagint, "and their genealogy. "(Menochius)
Katalogismos, may as well have the former signification, "their class "(Haydock) though the sequel seems to determine it in the latter sense. (Du Hamel)
